description: This table stores advisor relationships, mapping student IDs (s_ID) to instructor IDs (i_ID) to identify which instructor advises each student.
content:
Table Name:
advisor

Description:
This table stores advisor relationships, mapping student IDs (s_ID) to instructor IDs (i_ID) to identify which instructor advises each student.

Columns:
s_ID (TEXT), i_ID (TEXT)

Primary Keys:
None

Relationships:

description: The classroom table records each classroom’s building, room number, and capacity, providing a reference for room allocation and scheduling.
content:
Table Name:
classroom

Description:
The classroom table records each classroom’s building, room number, and capacity, providing a reference for room allocation and scheduling.

Columns:
building (TEXT), room_number (TEXT), capacity (BIGINT)

Primary Keys:
None

Relationships:

description: The course table holds details about academic courses, including a unique identifier, title, department name, and credit value. It is used to provide course information for scheduling, registration, and reporting.
content:
Table Name:
course

Description:
The course table holds details about academic courses, including a unique identifier, title, department name, and credit value. It is used to provide course information for scheduling, registration, and reporting.

Columns:
course_id (TEXT), title (TEXT), dept_name (TEXT), credits (BIGINT)

Primary Keys:
None

Relationships:

description: The department table records details about each department, such as its name, building location, and budget. This information is used for budgeting, facility management, and reporting purposes.
content:
Table Name:
department

Description:
The department table records details about each department, such as its name, building location, and budget. This information is used for budgeting, facility management, and reporting purposes.

Columns:
dept_name (TEXT), building (TEXT), budget (DOUBLE PRECISION)

Primary Keys:
None

Relationships:

description: The instructor table holds data on university faculty members, recording each instructor’s ID, name, department affiliation, and salary. It is used to manage and query instructor compensation and departmental assignments.
content:
Table Name:
instructor

Description:
The instructor table holds data on university faculty members, recording each instructor’s ID, name, department affiliation, and salary. It is used to manage and query instructor compensation and departmental assignments.

Columns:
ID (TEXT), name (TEXT), dept_name (TEXT), salary (DOUBLE PRECISION)

Primary Keys:
None

Relationships:

description: This table records prerequisite relationships between courses, mapping each course (course_id) to the courses that must be completed beforehand (prereq_id). It is used to enforce or display prerequisite chains in a curriculum.
content:
Table Name:
prereq

Description:
This table records prerequisite relationships between courses, mapping each course (course_id) to the courses that must be completed beforehand (prereq_id). It is used to enforce or display prerequisite chains in a curriculum.

Columns:
course_id (TEXT), prereq_id (TEXT)

Primary Keys:
None

Relationships:

description: This table stores details about each course section, including the course ID, section ID, semester, year, building, room number, and time slot. It is used to track where and when each section meets.
content:
Table Name:
section

Description:
This table stores details about each course section, including the course ID, section ID, semester, year, building, room number, and time slot. It is used to track where and when each section meets.

Columns:
course_id (TEXT), sec_id (TEXT), semester (TEXT), year (BIGINT), building (TEXT), room_number (TEXT), time_slot_id (TEXT)

Primary Keys:
None

Relationships:

description: The student table stores basic student information, including a unique identifier, name, department affiliation, and total earned credits. It is used to track student enrollment and academic progress.
content:
Table Name:
student

Description:
The student table stores basic student information, including a unique identifier, name, department affiliation, and total earned credits. It is used to track student enrollment and academic progress.

Columns:
ID (TEXT), name (TEXT), dept_name (TEXT), tot_cred (BIGINT)

Primary Keys:
None

Relationships:

description: This table logs student course enrollments, capturing the student ID, course and section identifiers, the semester and year of the term, and the grade awarded. It serves to track academic progress and enrollment history.
content:
Table Name:
takes

Description:
This table logs student course enrollments, capturing the student ID, course and section identifiers, the semester and year of the term, and the grade awarded. It serves to track academic progress and enrollment history.

Columns:
ID (TEXT), course_id (TEXT), sec_id (TEXT), semester (TEXT), year (BIGINT), grade (TEXT)

Primary Keys:
None

Relationships:

description: The teaches table records which instructor (ID) teaches which course (course_id) in a specific section (sec_id) during a given semester and year. It is used to track instructor assignments for course sections across semesters.
content:
Table Name:
teaches

Description:
The teaches table records which instructor (ID) teaches which course (course_id) in a specific section (sec_id) during a given semester and year. It is used to track instructor assignments for course sections across semesters.

Columns:
ID (TEXT), course_id (TEXT), sec_id (TEXT), semester (TEXT), year (BIGINT)

Primary Keys:
None

Relationships:

description: The time_slot table stores individual time slots, each defined by a day and start/end hour and minute. It is used to represent scheduled periods for appointments, classes, or resource bookings.
content:
Table Name:
time_slot

Description:
The time_slot table stores individual time slots, each defined by a day and start/end hour and minute. It is used to represent scheduled periods for appointments, classes, or resource bookings.

Columns:
time_slot_id (TEXT), day (TEXT), start_hr (BIGINT), start_min (BIGINT), end_hr (BIGINT), end_min (BIGINT)

Primary Keys:
None

Relationships:
